info.description: Reference to a video hosted on Cloudflare Stream. Strapi does not store the video file itself — upload it to Cloudflare Stream first (dashboard or API) and paste the resulting UID here.

videoUid.description: Cloudflare Stream video UID, e.g. the id returned after upload / from the Stream dashboard.

durationSeconds.description: Optional cached duration in seconds, useful for UI before the player loads.

thumbnail.description: Poster image for the video. Stored via the S3 upload provider.

captionsUrl.description: Optional URL to a VTT captions/subtitles track.

status.description: Encoding status, useful if you sync this from Cloudflare's webhook/API.
